theorem candidate_T1_free (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  by_contra hsum
  obtain ‚ü®a, ha‚ü© : ‚ąÉ a : G, Ōá a ‚Č† 1 := by
    by_contra hnot
    apply hŌá
    ext g
    by_contra hg
    exact hnot ‚ü®g, hg‚ü©
  have hmul : (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
    calc
      (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā))
          = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
              simpa [Finset.mul_sum]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (a * g) : ‚Ąā) := by
            refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
            intro g hg
            simpa using (map_mul Ōá a g)
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
            simpa using Finset.sum_bijective (fun g : G => a * g) (by
              intro x hx
              exact Finset.mem_univ _)
                (by
                  intro x hx
                  simp)
  have hŌáa_eq_one : (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) = 1 := by
    have hsum_ne : (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) ‚Č† 0 := hsum
    apply mul_right_cancel‚āÄ hsum_ne
    simpa [hmul]
  exact ha (by exact_mod_cast hŌáa_eq_one)
```

theorem candidate_T1_free (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  obtain ‚ü®a, ha‚ü© : ‚ąÉ a : G, Ōá a ‚Č† 1 := by
    by_contra h
    apply hŌá
    ext g
    by_contra hg
    exact h ‚ü®g, hg‚ü©
  have hmul : (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
    calc
      (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā))
          = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
              simp [mul_sum]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (a * g) : ‚Ąā) := by
            refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
            intro g _
            simpa using (map_mul Ōá a g)
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
            refine Finset.sum_bijective (fun g : G => a * g) ?_
            intro x
            exact ‚ü®a‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * x, by simp [mul_assoc]‚ü©
  by_contra hsum
  have hsum_ne : (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) ‚Č† 0 := hsum
  have hŌáa_eq_one : (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) = 1 := by
    apply mul_right_cancel‚āÄ hsum_ne
    simpa [hmul]
  exact ha (by
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact_mod_cast hŌáa_eq_one)
```

Location: ATP.temTH.CandidateTheorems.T1.Free:candidate_T1_free

Code:
```lean
theorem candidate_T1_free (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  by_contra hsum
  have hsum' : (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) ‚Č† 0 := hsum
  -- Pick an element where Ōá is not 1.
  have hne1 : ‚ąÉ a : G, Ōá a ‚Č† 1 := by
    by_contra hall
    apply hŌá
    ext g
    by_contra hg
    exact hall ‚ü®g, hg‚ü©
  rcases hne1 with ‚ü®a, ha‚ü©
  have hŌáa_ne_zero : (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) ‚Č† 0 := by
    exact_mod_cast (Units.ne_zero (Ōá a))
  have hŌáa_ne_one : (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) ‚Č† 1 := by
    intro h
    apply ha
    ext
    exact h
  -- Compare the sum with its left-translation by `a`.
  have hperm :
      (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (a * g) : ‚Ąā)) = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
    refine Finset.sum_bijective (fun g => a * g) ?_ ?_
    ¬∑ intro g _
      simp
    ¬∑ intro g _
      simp
  have hmul :
      (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (a * g) : ‚Ąā)) = (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
    calc
      (‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (a * g) : ‚Ąā))
          = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
              refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
              intro g hg
              simp [map_mul]
      _ = (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
            simp [Finset.mul_sum]
  have hkey : (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
    simpa [hperm] using hmul
  have hfactor : ((Ōá a : ‚Ąā) - 1) * ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
    linarith [hkey]
  have hsum_zero : ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
    apply mul_eq_zero.mp hfactor |> Or.resolve_left
    exact sub_ne_zero.mpr hŌáa_ne_one
  exact hsum' hsum_zero
```

Location: ATP.temTH.CandidateTheorems.T1.Free:candidate_T1_free

Code:
```lean
theorem candidate_T1_free (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  -- use the standard orthogonality lemma for nontrivial characters
  simpa using Character.sum_eq_zero_of_ne_one (G := G) (Ōá := Ōá) hŌá
```
